title: Golden Globes 2026: Gold Derby Prediction Results
text: Gold Derby users and experts recently completed predictions for the 2026 Golden Globes nominations across film and television categories. A Gold Derby user named Luketheu achieved the highest score, "accurately predicting 91 percent of the 2026 Golden Globes film nominations." This user correctly identified 71 of 78 nomination slots, including several unexpected picks like Ethan Hawke for Best Film Comedy/Musical Actor. Nearly 3,000 participants competed in the 13 film categories. Among Gold Derby's 11 editors, Marcus James Dixon led with 85.9% accuracy. Other notable editor scores included Denton Davidson and Kevin P. Sullivan at 84.6%, while Mia McNiece finished lowest at 66.7%. For the 18 industry experts making predictions, Cole Jaeger (The Oscar Expert) topped the rankings with 89.7% accuracy. Three experts tied at 87.2%, while several others clustered around the 83-85% range. Over 1,800 people predicted TV nominees across 13 categories. Editor-in-Chief Debra Birnbaum achieved the best result, with 80.6% accuracy. Among other editors, scores ranged from 65.3% to 73.6%. The Golden Globes ceremony airs January 11 on CBS and Paramount+, hosted by Nikki Glaser.
